title: Emotional State Tracking
narrative: Integration validation for STORY-468 (Emotional State Tracking) in the coaching-entrepreneur skill. This documentation story adds sections to src/claude/skills/coaching-entrepreneur/SKILL.md for tracking user emotional state across coaching sessions.

checks.details: SKILL.md contains valid YAML metadata with name, description fields
Found 18 sections with proper heading hierarchy (no orphaned #'s)
Document begins and ends with --- delimiters, properly closes at line 4
Path 'devforgeai/specs/business/coaching/session-log.yaml' referenced 2x in SKILL.md
STORY-468 and SKILL.md use consistent path notation (devforgeai/specs/business/coaching/)
Uses forward slashes (/) not backslashes, compatible with WSL/Windows/Linux
Found 5 reference links (celebration-engine.md, confidence-building-patterns.md, imposter-syndrome-interventions.md)
'Session Log Schema' appears exactly 1 time (no duplicates)
Persona Blend Engine section (lines 34-84) does not mention emotional state tracking
Confidence Detection section (lines 118-131) focuses on self-doubt signals, not emotional tracking
Fallback Behavior (lines 112-115) does not override emotional state tracking logic
Positioned after Confidence Detection (line 133+), logical flow: foundation → adaptation → tracking

checks.description: All 7 emotional state enum values present
checks.details: Found: energized, focused, neutral, tired, frustrated, anxious, overwhelmed

Subsection '### Override Handling' with 3-step process (respect, log, adjust)
States: 'If no previous session exists (first-time user), start with warm Coach mode introduction'
6/6 tests passed: section exists, enum values, date field, outcomes, override field, YAML path
3/3 tests passed: section exists, read logic documented, examples provided
3/3 tests passed: override handling documented, logging specified, immediate respect documented
